name: 10L Value Residual + Gated Attention + XSA4 + SWA + Late QAT
blurb: 10 layers with Value Residual (ResFormer, -0.015 BPB), Gated Attention (-0.003 BPB), XSA last 4 layers, Partial RoPE 16/64, LN Scale, GPTQ-lite quantization, SWA (28 checkpoints), Late QAT, SmearGate, BigramHash(2048), OrthoInit, int5-MLP/int6-attn + zstd-22, sliding window eval stride=64.
author: bigbag
